name: CARE AI Vision
description: AI-powered CARE plugin to extract and auto-fill patient registration details from scanned or photographed forms, with automatic governance hierarchy resolution.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_ai_vision_fe for development and manual testing.

appBaseUrl.label: App base URL
appBaseUrl.description: Base URL where the frontend plug is served.

mandatory.label: Gemini API Key
mandatory.description: API key for Google Gemini Flash, obtain from https://aistudio.google.com/apikey.

custom.label: Custom environments
custom.description: Add extra environment variables for advanced setup.
